ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $User.PS480FunctionValidationRulesActive__c =true, $User.UR100Trade25VAT__c =false, ISCHANGED(VATPercent__c), ISPICKVAL( VATPercent__c, "2.5%") || ISPICKVAL( VATPercent__c, "2.6%") )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You are not allowed to choose VAT 2.5%/2.6%. Please get in touch with Finance. (IN023)
